chunks.title: Mockery by the Young and Wicked
chunks.reason: Job describes how younger men mock him and their fathers, detailing their wretched state and how they now oppress him.

chunks.title: Physical Affliction and Divine Anger
chunks.reason: Job laments his internal suffering, physical decay, and the perception that God has loosed His bowstring against him.

chunks.title: Irony of Suffering and Final Lament
chunks.reason: Job questions if the wretched cry out to him, recalls his past compassion, and concludes with his total despair and changed music.
